lines.speaker: Snowflake
lines.text: Thank you for getting our herb patches to work. Now Boulder can grow goutweed for my people, and they are very happy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another copy of that book?

lines.speaker: Snowflake
lines.text: Yes, I have another copy for you.

lines.speaker: My Arm
lines.text: Snowflake an' My Arm very happy. Maybe new herbie patch not da only place where new life gonna be growin' soon!

lines.speaker: Snowflake
lines.text: Let's not get ahead of ourselves, dear! But the town is thriving; my people are much happier now they are no longer terrified of Father.

lines.speaker: My Arm
lines.text: Dem trolls likin' da goutweed too!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you note my basalt for me?

lines.speaker: Snowflake
lines.text: You will always be welcome back.

sections.title: When using goat dung on her

lines.speaker: My Arm
lines.text: That doesn't look solved to me.

lines.speaker: My Arm
lines.text: Well done [player name]. Here you go.
